LanguageData.APM.CommandCasket.Inspection: Remote control uplink is active for {PAWN}
LanguageData.APM.CommandCasket.Gizmo.CancelLink.Label: Cancel remote link
LanguageData.APM.CommandCasket.Gizmo.CancelLink.Desc: Cancel the remote link for the current occupant. The occupant will be ejected.
LanguageData.APM.CommandCasket.Gizmo.Shield.Label: remote shield
LanguageData.APM.CommandCasket.Gizmo.Shield.Desc: shield a friendly mechanoid, can target the whole map.
LanguageData.APM.CommandCasket.Gizmo.Repair.Label: remote repair
LanguageData.APM.CommandCasket.Gizmo.Repair.Desc: repair a friendly mechanoid till it is fully repaired or has no energy remaining. Can target the whole map.
LanguageData.APM.CommandCasket.Gizmo.Disconnect.Label: remote disconnect
LanguageData.APM.CommandCasket.Gizmo.Connect.Desc: remotely disconnect to a controled mech. Can target mechs on the same map.
LanguageData.APM.CommandCasket.Gizmo.Connect.Label: remote connect
LanguageData.APM.CommandCasket.Gizmo.Connect.Desc: remotely connect to a friendly mech. Can target mechs on the same map.
